# Premier Martial Arts Pines

Premier Martial Arts Pines is a martial arts school in Pembroke Pines, FL offering Tiny Champs, Little Champions, PMA Kids, Teens Martial Arts, Adult Martial Arts for kids, teens, and adults.

## About
Whether you're focused on fitness, self-improvement, or self-defense, Premier Martial Arts in Pembroke Pines is your destination.

## Programs
- Tiny Champs
- Little Champions
- PMA Kids
- Teens Martial Arts
- Adult Martial Arts

## Location
15893 Pines Blvd
Pembroke Pines, FL 33027

## Contact
Phone: (954) 431-5111
Website: https://premier-martial-arts-pembroke-pines.pages.dev

## Reviews
220 5-star Google reviews. Rating: 4.9/5.0
